infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Gratonite uses the camera for profile photos and video calls.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Gratonite uses the microphone for voice channels and calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Gratonite accesses your photos so you can upload images and videos in chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Gratonite may save media from chats to your photo library when you choose to download files.
